case_title: CARTER, PATRICK W. VS RICHARDSON, CHIQUITA

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT RICHARDSON, CHIQUITA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARTER, PATRICK W.
